programme.title: Trash Talker

programme.title: Precedent Nixin
programme.desc: King of Queens, S06E19, Carrie's plan to stay at a hotel while visiting Florida backfires when the hotel is overrun by spring breakers.

programme.title: Foe: Pa
programme.desc: King of Queens, S06E20, When Arthur embarrasses Carrie at a job interview, Doug must heal the breach between father and daughter.

programme.title: Tank Heaven
programme.desc: King of Queens, S06E21, Doug sabotages Carrie's efforts to socialize with her co-workers by doing crass things, such as showing them his chest hair. Amy Stiller guest stars.

programme.title: Alter Ego
programme.desc: King of Queens, S06E22, Doug, Deacon, Danny and Spence take an impulsive trip to Memphis to try to stop the wedding of Spence's ex-girlfriend (Rachel Dratch).

programme.title: Icky Shuffle
programme.desc: King of Queens, S06E23, Carrie comes down with a cold; Arthur must find a teammate for the senior center's shuffleboard tournament.

programme.title: Awful Bigamy

programme.title: Lost Vegas

programme.title: Durgan Groupie
programme.desc: King of Queens, S07E02, Jealous of Carrie's new job, Doug asks his boss for a promotion and gets put in charge of safety.

programme.title: Furious Gorge

programme.title: Silent Mite

programme.desc: King of Queens, S07E08, Deacon and Kelly find new couple friends, forcing Doug and Carrie to turn to their old reliable couple friends, Neal and Marcy.

programme.desc: King of Queens, S07E09, Doug wears a cologne Carrie dislikes to try to convince himself and the guys that she does not control him.

programme.title: Norm And Cliff's Excellent Adventure
programme.desc: Cheers, S09E12, Cliff and Norm's practical joking put Sam and Frasier at odds with each other.

programme.title: Woody Interruptus
programme.desc: Cheers, S09E13, Woody's gripped with fear of losing Kelly when she returns with a Frenchman.

programme.title: Honor Thy Mother
programme.desc: Cheers, S09E14, Carla resists her mother's dying wish of renaming her son Benito Mussolini.

programme.title: Achilles Hill
programme.desc: Cheers, S09E15, Sam gets revenge on restaurateur John Allen Hill by dating his daughter.

programme.title: Days Of Wine And Neuroses
programme.desc: Cheers, S09E16, Rebecca reveals her true feelings about Sam when Robin proposes.

programme.title: Wedding Bell Blues
programme.desc: Cheers, S09E17, Sam tries to stop Rebecca's from marrying Robin after she confesses her feelings.

programme.title: I'm Getting My Act Together And Sticking It In Your Face
programme.desc: Cheers, S09E18, Sam inadvertently leaves a message on Rebecca's machine that he loves her.

programme.title: Sam Time Next Year
programme.desc: Cheers, S09E19, Sam injures his back while on his annual Valentine's Day date with his old flame.

programme.title: Crash Of The Titans
programme.desc: Cheers, S09E20, Sam and Rebecca try to buy the bar's poolroom and restrooms from John Allen Hill. In the end, Rebecca pays for the majority of the cost, in exchange for part ownership of Cheers.

programme.title: It's A Wonderful Wife
programme.desc: Cheers, S09E21, Norm's wife takes a job at the restaurant above Cheers.

programme.title: Cheers Has Chili
programme.desc: Cheers, S09E22, Woody increases traffic at Cheers by selling his famous chili.

programme.title: Carla Loves Clavin
programme.desc: Cheers, S09E23, Cliff poses as a judge in the Miss Barmaid contest to win Carla's favor.

programme.title: Pitch It Again, Sam
programme.desc: Cheers, S09E24, Sam plans to strike out an old baseball rival at a charity game.

programme.title: Rat Girl
programme.desc: Cheers, S09E25, Frasier fears Lilith is losing her mind when she's overcome with grief over the death of one of her laboratory rats.

programme.title: Home Malone
programme.desc: Cheers, S09E26, Sam locks himself out of the house while babysitting for Lilith and Frasier's son.

programme.title: Uncle Sam Wants You
programme.desc: Cheers, S09E27, Sam embarks on a search for a suitable mother to have his baby.

programme.title: Baby Balk
programme.desc: Cheers, S10E01, Sam and Rebecca seek psychiatric help for getting in the mood.

programme.title: Get Your Kicks On Route 666
programme.desc: Cheers, S10E02, The guys of Cheers get stranded when they take a road trip on Route 66.

programme.title: Madame LaCarla
programme.desc: Cheers, S10E03, Carla's psychic asks her to take over her spiritual reading business.

programme.title: The Norm Who Came To Dinner
programme.desc: Cheers, S10E04, Norm stays at Lilith and Fraiser's house while recovering from an injury.

programme.title: Ma's Little Maggie
programme.desc: Cheers, S10E05, Cliff's mom wants him to get married when she meets his girlfriend.

programme.title: Unplanned Parenthood
programme.desc: Cheers, S10E06, Woody hires an actress to pose as Kelly in a home video to his parents.

programme.title: Bar Wars V: The Final Judgement
programme.desc: Cheers, S10E07, Sam's convinced that the death of his rival is jus a silly one of his pranks.

programme.title: Where Have All The Floorboards Gone?
programme.desc: Cheers, S10E08, Cliff's brainteaser could prove to be undoing of Kevin McHale.

programme.title: Head Over Hill
programme.desc: Cheers, S10E09, Cliff's taken for a wild horse ride when he participates in a commemoration.

programme.title: A Fine French Whine
programme.desc: Cheers, S10E10, Woody's girl agrees to marry Frenchman Henri to keep him from getting deported.

programme.title: I'm Ok, You're Defective
programme.desc: Cheers, S10E11, Rebecca blames Sam for their lack of offspring when she passes her fertility test.

programme.title: Go Make
programme.desc: Cheers, S10E12, Sam and Rebecca question whether or not they really love each other.

programme.title: Don't Shoot I'm Only The Psychiatrist
programme.desc: Cheers, S10E13, Frasier takes his "low self-esteem group" to Cheers for interactive therapy.

programme.title: No Rest For The Woody
programme.desc: Cheers, S10E14, Woody takes a second job at a graveyard to pay for Kelly's engagement ring.

programme.title: My Son, The Father
programme.desc: Cheers, S10E15, Carla acts like a holy terror when her son decides to join the priesthood.

programme.title: One Hugs, The Other Doesn't
programme.desc: Cheers, S10E16, Frasier has a run-in with his first wife while at a children's concert with his family.

programme.title: A Diminished Rebecca With A Suspended Cliff
programme.desc: Cheers, S10E17, Woody's cousin develops a crush on Rebecca and Cliff is very unhappy with the new postal uniforms.

programme.title: License To Hill
programme.desc: Cheers, S10E18, While Woody takes the gang to the cleaner on poker night, Cheers gets busted.

programme.title: Rich Man, Wood Man
programme.desc: Cheers, S10E19, Woody returns from England with a new wardrobe and elitist attitude.

programme.title: The Hot Zone
programme.desc: Cosmic Vistas: The Hot Zone, S04E03, Mercury is one Earth's closest neighbors, but for centuries it eluded astronomer's best efforts to learn its secrets. But that has changed thanks to missions like Mariner and most recently, Messenger.

programme.title: Night Fire
programme.desc: Cosmic Vistas: Night Fire, S02E05, The Northern Lights are more than just beautiful; they tell us about the make up of our planet, our sun, and may even be a signpost for the possibility of life on other planets.

programme.title: Water Worlds
programme.desc: Cosmic Vistas: Water Worlds, S03E03, The key ingredient to life in the universe is water. Until recently we thought Earth was the only place in the solar system to have any water at all. Now that probes are peering around nearby worlds we are finding that is just not the case.

programme.title: The Giant Planets: Lords of Gravity / Outer Limits: Edge of the Solar System
programme.desc: Cosmic Vistas, S01E16, See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Gravity
programme.desc: Cosmic Vistas: Gravity, S03E04, Gravity has long been a force that has intrigued scientists. Now, for the first time scientists are probing to detect gravity waves in space as well as mapping the gravity patterns of the moon.

programme.title: Stargazer's Paradise
programme.desc: Cosmic Vistas: Stargazer's Paradise, S02E04, The Atacama desert is a perfect place for watching the night sky. With still winds and only a handful of cloudy nights each year, it allows scientists to get the absolute most out of their tools.

programme.title: Science and the Shuttle
programme.desc: Cosmic Vistas: Science and the Shuttle, S03E05, For more than 25 years the shuttle was our ticket to space, and our laboratory in orbit. Uncover the legacy of this amazing machine, and see what lies ahead.

programme.title: Cosmic Rays
programme.desc: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rays, S04E04, Cosmic rays can tell us much about the universe. They are not simply another form of light, but carriers of information about powerful and unseen processes at work thousands or even millions of light years away.

programme.title: Seasons of Saturn
programme.desc: Cosmic Vistas: Seasons of Saturn, S03E01, Saturn is the second largest planet and has an astonishing 60 moons in its orbit. Thanks to the Cassini mission, it's also one of the most studied and most photographed planets in our neighborhood.

programme.title: Hidden Havens: Icy Moons / Icy Gems: Frozen Moons
programme.desc: Cosmic Vistas, S01E17, See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

Earthrise: The First Lunar Voyage, 20130101080000 +0000, Interviews with Apollo 8 astronauts, their wives, mission control staff, and journalists give true insider's perspective to the space race of the late 1960's.

How to Colonize the Stars, 20090101080000 +0000, Leading physicists and engineers in the field of interstellar travel discuss some of the deep issues we face when considering the problem of sending spacecraft to other stars. Will mankind ever truly become a space fairing civilization?

programme.title: The Mystery of the Milky Way
programme.desc: Hunting the Edge of Space: The Mystery of the Milky Way, S01E01, The Mystery of the Milky Way chronicles the history of telescopes, from Galileo's refractor to Newton's reflector and beyond. This episode also looks at recent missions, including the Herschel Space Observatory's examination of the Milky Wa

programme.title: The Ever Expanding Universe
programme.desc: Hunting the Edge of Space: The Ever Expanding Universe, S01E02, The Ever-Expanding Universe investigates a battery of high-tech telescopes that are joining the Hubble Space Telescope on its quest to unlock the secrets of our universe, a cosmos almost incomprehensible in its size, age and violence.

In the Shadow of the Moon, 20070101080000 +0000, Between 1968 and 1972, the world watched in awe each time an American spacecraft voyaged to the Moon. Only 12 men walked upon its surface and they remain the only human beings to have stood on another world.

programme.title: Episode 4: Black Holes
programme.desc: Inside Outer Space: Episode 4: Black Holes, S01E04, Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Episode 3: Asteroids
programme.desc: Inside Outer Space: Episode 3: Asteroids, S01E03, Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Episode 6: Fermi paradox
programme.desc: Inside Outer Space: Episode 6: Fermi paradox, S01E06, Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Episode 5: Space Missions
programme.desc: Inside Outer Space: Episode 5: Space Missions, S01E05, Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Episode 2: Moons
programme.desc: Inside Outer Space: Episode 2: Moons, S01E02, Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Episode 7: The Milky Way
programme.desc: Inside Outer Space: Episode 7: The Milky Way, S01E07, Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Episode 8: Extravehicular Activity
programme.desc: Inside Outer Space: Episode 8: Extravehicular Activity, S01E08, Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Episode 1: The Solar System
programme.desc: Inside Outer Space: Episode 1: The Solar System, S01E01, This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see, how we can live in space and what science tells us about the past and the future as we journey inside out of space.

Moon Shots: Inside the Lost Apollo Archive, 20160101080000 +0000, The world famous Apollo missions are some of the greatest feats ever accomplished by man. With rare archive footage and unprecedented access to life on board the Apollo spacecrafts, this stunning one-hour special brings scientific history to life.
Neil Armstrong: One Small Step, 20150720000000 +0000, Neil Armstrong has stamped his place in history by becoming the first person to walk on the moon.

programme.title: Monday Night Murder
programme.desc: Fatal Crimes, S01E03, When a man's family and co-workers lose touch with him and can't find any trace of him for days, the police are sent to his apartment to investigate and see what they can figure it out.

programme.title: Killer Gambit
programme.desc: Fatal Crimes, S01E10, Vince is a seasoned New Orleans sportscaster, and his marriage to the much younger Liz looks like a second chance for them both.

programme.title: Misery in Missouri
programme.desc: Fatal Crimes, S01E17, Randy Stone is the sort of big-hearted, outgoing guy everybody likes. So how did he end up shot to death on the floor of his Independence, Missouri insurance office?

programme.title: Drop Dead Gorgeous
programme.desc: Fatal Crimes, S01E24, When a Texas oil tycoon's badly decomposing body is found in his beauty queen girlfriend's mansion, police fear the worst and issue a nationwide alert to find her.

programme.title: Stephen Grant
programme.desc: Killer Mysteries, S01E31, When a mother of two is reported missing, five days after her disappearance, her husband becomes the chief suspect. But is his affair with the nanny enough of a motive to kill? And where is the body?

programme.title: Horror in Tennessee
programme.desc: Killer Mysteries, S01E38, A short-order cook with aspirations of country stardom falls on hard times.

programme.title: Leonard Lake and Charles Ng
programme.desc: Killer Mysteries, S01E45, Two ex-marines join forces abducting women.

programme.title: The Killer Conman
programme.desc: Killer Mysteries, S01E52, A businessman by day transforms into a sadomasochistic by night. This veteran conman lures unsuspecting women with a web of lies and empty promises.

programme.title: The Toy Box
programme.desc: Killer Mysteries, S01E59, A state employee abducts women and keeps them captive.

programme.title: Of Vengeance & Murder
programme.desc: Killer Mysteries, S01E66, A look at a criminal who robs and kills middle-aged men in central Florida.

programme.title: Dreaming of Murder

programme.title: Love and Hate
programme.desc: Cold Case Files, S02E07, Near what's known as the hanging tree, the mutilated body of Timothy Coggins is found in late 1983. The investigation is thwarted and the case freezes for over 30 years, until a newly elected sheriff vows to bring the killers to justice.

programme.title: Green River Killer/Missing And The Dead
programme.desc: Cold Case Files Classic, S03E13, In 1982 and '83, Seattle's Green River Killer stalked prostitutes like game. With 49 victims, he could be the deadliest serial killer in U.S. history. Then, a passing motorist spots a fire along a road in South Carolina and calls it in.

programme.title: The Cuff Link/The Unluckiest Man
programme.desc: Cold Case Files Classic, S02E11, Police solve an old murder case with a painstaking examination of the tool mark on the plastic flex cuff that bound the victim's hands, and a 15-year-old murder case is finally cracked open.

programme.title: The Sunday Morning Slasher
programme.desc: Cold Case Files Classic, S05E11, Law enforcement officials fear they may have to release a serial killer from prison until a 24-year-old murder case gives them a chance to lock him up for good.

programme.title: Lone Survivor
programme.desc: Cold Case Files, S02E27, In early 1984, three-year-old Vanessa Bennett becomes the lone survivor of her family's brutal murder. Initial investigators suspect a serial killer is at large, but decades pass before DNA narrows the suspect pool to one man.

programme.title: Killer On The Strip/The Doll Murder
programme.desc: Cold Case Files Classic, S01E11, In 1989, socialite Susan Doll was found beaten, raped, and strangled in Colorado.

programme.title: A Killer's Skin / Where's Peggy? (#110)
programme.desc: Cold Case Files Classic, S05E28, Police in Albany, N.Y., get a surprise when a killer they think targets only older women is suspected in the murder of an elderly man. And the contents of a secret storage shed holds the grisly clues to a murder that has gone cold for more than 14 years.

programme.title: Ice Cold in Denver
programme.desc: Cold Case Files, S02E08, On a bitter morning in 1980, radio intern Helene Pruszynski is found brutalized in a snowy field. After 37 years of fruitless leads, investigators tap into a genealogy website that gives them a lead.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classics
programme.desc: Cold Case Files Classic, S05E17, In Rhode Island, policewomen go undercover as streetwalkers to nab the man suspected of murdering three prostitutes. And a dagger-shaped letter opener is the key piece of evidence that links a priest to the grisly 1980 murder of a nun in Ohio.

programme.title: Blood Money/Precious Doe
programme.desc: Cold Case Files Classic, S03E20, Testimony about the growth of larvae in dead bodies helps convict the man who stabbed a couple to death and strangled their 4-year-old daughter in 1993.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classics
programme.desc: Cold Case Files Classic, S02E13, Police reopen a rape-murder case 25 years after the crime and find enough DNA evidence to bring him to justice. And a confession made to a "Baywatch" TV star helps police solve the three-year-old riddle of a wealthy Newport Beach woman's murder.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classics
programme.desc: Cold Case Files Classic, S01E06, In Missouri, a part-time missionary is convicted, 38 years later, of killing her 5-year-old stepdaughter, and the skeleton of a Michigan boy, dead for 10 years, leads police to a serial killer.

programme.title: Cold Ashes
programme.desc: Cold Case Files, S02E20, When a deadly house fire claims the life of a family in rural Oklahoma, investigators suspect foul play and it sends a mother on a decades-long crusade to find out what happened to her missing teenage daughter and best friend.

programme.title: Kidnapped
programme.desc: Cold Case Files Classic, S04E01, A kidnapper grabs 8-year-old Chad Choice from his home in Texas, then torments his parents with two ransom demands. The case goes cold until the parents receive a chilling package in the mail that contains a letter--and a skull.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classics
programme.desc: Cold Case Files Classic, S04E17, A look at the case of James Allen Selby, a serial rapist who eluded police for years while attacking 11 women in five states - Oklahoma, Nevada, California, Arizona, and Colorado.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classics
programme.desc: Cold Case Files Classic, S05E22, The killing of a woman in a VA goes unsolved for a quarter of a century before investigators are finally able to zero in on the likely killer. And, in 1999 detectives test the blood evidence and develop a DNA profile of a shooting death from 1980.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classics
programme.desc: Cold Case Files Classic, S02E07, A woman's fall from a cliff in the Grand Canyon leads police to uncover a series of grisly murders, and investigators smoke out a killer when they find crucial DNA evidence on his cigarette butts.

programme.title: Gunslinger
programme.desc: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Gunslinger, S05E11, The widow of a murdered sheriff attempts to clean up the crime in her small town with help from the man hired to kill her.

programme.title: The Day the Earth Froze
programme.desc: Mystery Science Theater 3000: The Day the Earth Froze, S05E22, Joel and the Bots learn the ins and outs of the circus in the short Here Comes the Circus (1946) and then try to make sense of the Nordic fairy tale film The Day the Earth Froze (1959).

programme.title: Racket Girls
programme.desc: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Racket Girls, S06E16, A plastic surgeon (played by Neil Connery, brother of Sean), the brother of a secret agent, combats villain Thair Beta.

programme.title: The Painted Hills
programme.desc: Mystery Science Theater 3000: The Painted Hills, S06E26, A Lassie movie, set in 1870s California amongst rival gold miners. The 1950s-era short teaches college students how to improve their hygiene.

programme.title: Backlot: MST3K 25th Anniversary: The Characters
programme.desc: Backlot: MST3K 25th Anniversary, S01E06, In part one of the complete history of MST3K, Joel and the rest of the crew discuss the show's origins and the DIY feel of the early seasons.

programme.title: Red Zone Cuba
programme.desc: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Red Zone Cuba, S06E19, An escaped convict and his two pals take part in the Bay of Pigs invasion, then return home with a plan to get rich.

programme.title: Backlot: MST3K 25th Anniversary: The Characters
programme.desc: Backlot: MST3K 25th Anniversary, S01E06, In part one of the complete history of MST3K, Joel and the rest of the crew discuss the show's origins and the DIY feel of the early seasons.
Film Crew The Giant of Marathon, 20071009070000 +0000, The Film Crew rip apart B-Movie legend Steve Reeves and The Giant of Marathon.
Film Crew: Hollywood After Dark, 20070710070000 +0000, The Film Crew gives a commentary track to Walk the Angry Beach, aka Hollywood After Dark, featuring Rue McClanahan as a stripper.
Film Crew: Killers From Space, 20070807070000 +0000, Former Mystery Science Theater 3000 crew rip apart Killers from Space.
Film Crew: The Wild Women of Wongo, 20070911070000 +0000, Bob Honcho orders the Film Crew to provide a commentary track for the bizarre prehistoric adventure film, The Wild Women of Wongo (1958).

programme.title: The Chili
programme.desc: Good Witch, 20260312005753 +0000, Hallmark Original Series. Cassie and Joy discover a time capsule that Grace buried years ago.

programme.title: The Clock
programme.desc: Good Witch, 20260312015016 +0000, Hallmark Original Series. Cassie, Abigail and Joy browse an estate sale.

programme.title: The Dinner
programme.desc: Good Witch, 20260312023938 +0000, Hallmark Original Series. Martha receives a mysterious letter before a Middleton progressive dinner.

programme.title: The Mandala
programme.desc: Good Witch, 20260312032900 +0000, Hallmark Original Series. Cassie pursues a temporary art history professorship while Sam diagnoses Adam.

programme.title: The Dream
programme.desc: Good Witch, 20260312041907 +0000, Hallmark Original Series. Joy dreams that Abigail and Donovan break up.

programme.title: The Tableau
programme.desc: Good Witch, 20260312051050 +0000, Hallmark Original Series. Cassie displays Nathaniel Merriwick's paintings for Grey House's 225th birthday.

programme.title: The Chocolates
programme.desc: Good Witch, 20260312060022 +0000, Hallmark Original Series. Kenny the Chocolate King comes to Middleton.
The Water is Wide, 20260312065223 +0000, Hallmark Hall of Fame. During the 1960s, a schoolteacher comes to the coast of South Carolina to teach.
Loving Leah, 20260312084219 +0000, Hallmark Hall of Fame. When Leah's husband Benjamin dies suddenly, she is to marry his brother.
Lead with Your Heart, 20260312102400 +0000, Hallmark Original Movie. Two teens hatch a plot to make their parents realize they still love each other.
Love at First Bark, 20260312120625 +0000, Hallmark Original Movie. Julia adopts a dog and seeks the help of handsome dog trainer Owen.
Lucky in Love, 20260312134525 +0000, Hallmark Original Movie. Mira's dream life becomes a reality, after a few innocent April Fool's jokes.
South Beach Love, 20260312152712 +0000, Hallmark Original Movie. Two chefs compete to create the best quinceañera celebration in South Beach.

programme.title: Crossroads
programme.desc: Stargate SG-1, S04E04, When a High Priestess from the planet Chulak claims to have a plan that would cripple the Goa'uld, everyone is skeptical. SG-1 must join forces with the Tok'ra in order to put her plan into effect, but a deadly, hidden secret could jeopardize it.

programme.title: Divide And Conquer
programme.desc: Stargate SG-1, S04E05, When an SGC soldier under the influence of a Goa'uld mind-control device attempts to assassinate a High Council member, SG-1 must uncover other potential assassins, even amongst themselves, before the president arrives for a crucial Summit meeting!

programme.title: Window Of Opportunity
programme.desc: Stargate SG-1, S04E06, After a visit to a strange planet in the middle of a geomagnetic storm they find themselves repeating the same day over and over again. The team must utilize their accumulated knowledge to stop the time loop before there are disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Watergate
programme.desc: Stargate SG-1, S04E07, SG-1 joins forces with a Russian scientist to investigate a rogue Stargate in Siberia, linked to a mysterious water planet. The team must venture via submarine to the water planet, where they encounter an unexpectedly terrifying alien presence.

programme.title: The First Ones
programme.desc: Stargate SG-1, S04E08, During an archaeological survey of fossils on a Goa'uld planet, Daniel is abducted by a fearsome creature, prompting SG-1 to embark on a mission to free him. But Daniel soon learns that the creature's intentions are not what he thought!

programme.title: Common Ground
programme.desc: Stargate Atlantis, S03E07, Summoned to a planet by a communication code, the team is ambushed by Kolya, who has now created his own faction of Genii after being forced from the inner circle. While the rest of the team manages to escape, Sheppard is taken prisoner.

programme.title: Mckay And Mrs. Miller
programme.desc: Stargate Atlantis, S03E08, McKay is called back to earth to convince his estranged sister, Jeannie Miller, to assist the Air Force. McKay and Jeannie travel to Atlantis and begin the experiment which is initially successful until a McKay from the parallel universe appears.

programme.title: Phantoms
programme.desc: Stargate Atlantis, S03E09, Major Leonard's team fails to check in with Atlantis while on a mission. Following the energy readings in hope of finding Major Leonard and his men, McKay leads the team into a cave to discover that the cause the energy spike is a Wraith generator.

programme.title: The Return (Part 1)
programme.desc: Stargate Atlantis, S03E10, The now awakened Ancients meet with O'Neill and Woolsey, thanking them for taking care of the city but also asking them to vacate Atlantis. While Ronon and Teyla stay in the Pegasus galaxy, the rest struggle to resume their lives on Earth.

programme.title: The Return (Part 2)
programme.desc: Stargate Atlantis, S03E11, O'Neill and Woolsey, the lone survivors of the replicators' bloody coup, hide out in an abandoned section of the city. Knowing Landry has an order to nuke Atlantis if a foothold situation should ever arise, the two lay low awaiting their fate.

programme.title: Echoes
programme.desc: Stargate Atlantis, S03E12, Teyla begins to see apparitions of ancients in distress and believes they are the ghosts of the Ancients recently massacred by the Replicators. McKay believes he's found the whale that saved him a year ago while trapped in a submerged puddle jumper.

programme.title: Irresponsible
programme.desc: Stargate Atlantis, S03E13, The team hear of a great warrior with stories of defeating both the Genii and Wraith and seek him out in hopes of making a new ally. But when they learn this great warrior is none other than Lucius they believe he's up to his old tricks again.

programme.title: Tao Of Rodney
programme.desc: Stargate Atlantis, S03E14, Trying to preserve power by turning off all the non-essential systems the Ancients recently activated before being killed by the replicators, McKay mistakenly is hit by an energy beam from a mysterious device.

programme.title: The Greater Good
programme.desc: Stargate Universe, S02E07, When Destiny comes upon a heavily damaged ship, Dr. Rush and Col. Young decide to make a dangerous space-suited expedition to the ship. But an unexpected turn of events leaves Dr. Rush and Col. Young stranded aboard the strange vessel.

programme.title: Malice
programme.desc: Stargate Universe, S02E08, Lucian Alliance prisoner Simeon escapes, creating a manhunt on a remote planet. But Homeworld Command orders he be captured alive, believing Simeon has valuable information. Simeon must be brought back to the Destiny before he kills or is killed.

programme.title: Visitation
programme.desc: Stargate Universe, S02E09, With no recollection of how they got to the Destiny, crew members left behind over a year earlier make a mysterious return. After an unsettling turn, the memories stirred through regression therapy prove disastrous for those who’ve returned.

programme.title: Resurgence
programme.desc: Stargate Universe, S02E10, In the hopes of finding something beneficial, the crew follows an energy signature that leads them to a mysterious sea of lifeless ships. With no visible signs of danger, the crew set off to take a closer look. But things may not be what they seem.

programme.title: Crossroads
programme.desc: Stargate SG-1, S04E04, When a High Priestess from the planet Chulak claims to have a plan that would cripple the Goa'uld, everyone is skeptical. SG-1 must join forces with the Tok'ra in order to put her plan into effect, but a deadly, hidden secret could jeopardize it.

programme.title: Housewarming
programme.desc: Beverly Hills, 90210, S07E06, David and Mark throw a big party at their house. Clare catches Steve kissing another girl. Valerie comes clean with Brandon about her affair with Kenny.

programme.title: Fearless
programme.desc: Beverly Hills, 90210, S07E07, Kenny orders Valerie to terminate her pregnancy. Steve is miffed when Clare chooses to go to the Halloween concert with egotistical Dick Harrison. Brandon and Tracy spend time together at the club.

programme.title: The Things We Do For Love
programme.desc: Beverly Hills, 90210, S07E08, Steve overhears Val discussing her pregnancy on the phone. David's grandfather leaves him $250,000 and a 1961 Thunderbird. An uncomfortable Tracy decides to quit her TV job after Brandon nixes a relationship.

programme.title: Loser Take All
programme.desc: Beverly Hills, 90210, S07E09, Brandon goes to see Kenny, who portrays himself as an innocent victim caught on the web of an evil vixen. Mel, worried by David's newfound wealth, asks Donna to keep an eye on him. Steve impresses Clare with his dedication as he trains for the crew race.

programme.title: If I Had A Hammer
programme.desc: Beverly Hills, 90210, S07E11, During must see a psychiatrist after displaying hostile behavior. Mel agrees with the doctor's recommendation that David be held 72 hours for observation. Steve faces plagiarism charges. The gang helps Willie build a house.

programme.title: Judgment Day
programme.desc: Beverly Hills, 90210, S07E12, Steve elects to plead guilty, leaving his punishment to the lenient Chancellor Arnold. Brandon refuses to plead guilty to a crime he did not commit, and faces a hearing and possible expulsion. Felice objects to Donna's renewed relationship with David.

programme.title: Unnecessary Roughness
programme.desc: Beverly Hills, 90210, S07E15, Donna believes she has solved the mystery of her stalker's identity when she sees Garrett Slan, the man who tried to rape her, at the university.

programme.title: Face-Off
programme.desc: Beverly Hills, 90210, S07E16, Donna's request for a permanent restraining order against Slan is denied. Tracy accidentally tells Brandon that she loves him. Steve and Clare consider living together as they spend a weekend house sitting. David takes an interest in a young singer.

programme.title: We Interrupt This Program
programme.desc: Beverly Hills, 90210, S07E17, Donna's stalker confesses and holds the entire staff of the TV station hostage.

programme.title: With This Ring
programme.desc: Beverly Hills, 90210, S07E19, Brandon and Kelly each confess their feelings to friends, but expect the other person to make a move. Donna tries to reconcile with David. Steve and Clare double date with Ryan and his girlfriend.

programme.title: A Ripe Young Age
programme.desc: Beverly Hills, 90210, S07E20, Donna and David visit her grandmother in San Luis Obispo. Noting a striking resemblance between David and her late husband, Mrs. Martin tells the couple about her romance with Donna's grandfather.

programme.title: Storm Warnings
programme.desc: Beverly Hills, 90210, S07E21, Joey returns to the beach apartment. Rob irritates his manager by seeking Val's advice about whether to sign on for a new movie. Jim and Cindy invite Brandon to spend spring vacation in Hong Kong.

programme.title: Spring Breakdown
programme.desc: Beverly Hills, 90210, S07E22, Brandon and Tracy visit Jim in Hong Kong; Cindy is in London helping Brenda cope with mononucleosis. Clare and Steve encourage Kelly to go out instead of moping around the apartment.

programme.title: Heaven Sent
programme.desc: Beverly Hills, 90210, S07E23, Mariah comes to town to give a lecture at the university's new age festival. She develops an instant connection with Kelly, prompting Tracy to bristle. David tries to plan a special evening for Donna.

programme.title: All That Jazz
programme.desc: Beverly Hills, 90210, S07E26, Brandon has to take care of Kelly and Valerie, who are both laid up with the flu. The girls discuss the reasons for their feud.

programme.title: Mother's Day
programme.desc: Beverly Hills, 90210, S07E27, Kelly learns that she is pregnant. Val makes a pass at David, prompting Donna to order him to end their working relationship. Clare is saddened by Mother's Day, so Steve tries to take her mind off things by going for a drive.

programme.title: The Way We Weren't
programme.desc: Beverly Hills, 90210, S08E04, Brandon is heartbroken when Kelly is unable to remember their relationship. Valerie helps organize Donna when she has trouble keeping track of her clients. Donna decides to make Val her business partner.

Secrets of a Marine's Wife, 20260311234300 +0000, Friends, family and local law enforcement investigate the mysterious disappearance of Erin Corwin, a young pregnant woman married to U.S. Marine Jon Corwin.
Secrets of an Undercover Wife, 20260312012800 +0000, A newlywed searches for answers after the arrest of her husband for murder and embezzlement.

programme.title: Teens Gone Wild
